title: Inserting Clients Company Name into a Mass Email
excerpt:
Hi, I use the mass email function fairly frequently. I know how to use the insert column function (I always use it to insert their first name for example). 
What I am trying to do is insert their Company/Business Name to…

posts.author: PeteC (Peter Clamp)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I use the mass email function fairly frequently. I know how to use the insert column function (I always use it to insert their first name for example).

What I am trying to do is insert their Company/Business Name too. This could be in the Subject line such as ‘How we can help {Acme Group} Generate more Sales!’.

Problem is, I now have 16,000 contacts and the only company name column I have is the one that links to their Account, whilst it displays the comapny name as a link to the accounts board (ie I can click on it and it takes me to ‘Acme Group’), it does not show up as an option to add as a {} Column when creating a mass email.

Is there a quick and easy way on the Contacts board to duplicate what is in the ‘Accounts’ linked column, but as plain text in a ‘Company’ column which I could then use in mass emails? I can do it by exporting in Excel, then re-importing however I do not want to do that for 16,000 contacts AND lose all the associated emails, updates, files etc attached to their name…

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: I don’t have an answer on that but that’s a great suggestion though! Have you put it on the feature suggestion board? Feature requests - monday Community Forum
